ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alloys" (
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alloy */,
  "alloy_num" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each alloy type (e.g., 6061-T6) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the alloy in inches */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the alloy in inches */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the alloy in inches */,
  "outside_diameter" REAL /* Outside diameter of the alloy in inches */,
  "inside_diameter" REAL /* Inside diameter of the alloy in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the alloy in inches */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the alloy in g/cm^3 */,
  "youngs_modulus" REAL /* Young's modulus of the alloy in GPa */,
  "poissons_ratio" REAL /* Poisson's ratio of the alloy */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength of the alloy in MPa */,
  "yield_strength" REAL /* Yield strength of the alloy in MPa */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alloy was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the alloy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alloy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the storage location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the storage location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the storage location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the storage location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the storage location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alloy_storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage event */,
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alloy being stored */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the alloy stored */,
  "storage_date" TEXT /* Date the alloy was stored */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the alloy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alloy_storage_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES storage_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alloy_storage_alloy_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloy_id") REFERENCES alloys ("alloy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, quality control specialist, warehouse manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, quality control, warehouse) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alloy_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alloy being certified */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alloy_certifications_alloy_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloy_id") REFERENCES alloys ("alloy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alloy_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alloy being specified */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_version" TEXT /* Version of the specification */,
  "specification_date" TEXT /* Date the specification was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alloy_specifications_alloy_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloy_id") REFERENCES alloys ("alloy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_order" (
  "po_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "alloy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alloy being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the alloy ordered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES supplier ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_order_alloy_id FOREIGN KEY ("alloy_id") REFERENCES alloys ("alloy_id")
)
